scripts.e2e: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @loom/api && npm run build -w @loom/web && npx playwright install chromium && npm run e2e -w @loom/e2e
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @loom/api && npm run build -w @loom/web
